summary: Comprehensive testing of Aria Dashboard v2.0 Health page and Dashboard. Fixed critical Dashboard data loading issue. All backend APIs working (100%), frontend fully functional with both themes.

minor.issue: Slow response (up to 20s) when external services are unreachable
minor.note: Expected behavior - services are offline in preview environment

fixed_issues.issue: Dashboard showed 0 values for stats and no services after login
fixed_issues.root_cause: Promise.all was waiting for /api/health/services which was timing out (external services unreachable)
fixed_issues.fix: Added 3-second timeout to health/services API call in Dashboard.jsx

passed_tests: Backend: API health check (GET /api/health)
Backend: Setup status (GET /api/setup/status)
Backend: Login with valid credentials (POST /api/auth/login)
Backend: Login rejection with invalid credentials
Backend: Auth me with token (GET /api/auth/me)
Backend: Auth me without token returns 401
Backend: System health returns CPU, memory, uptime, disks, network (GET /api/health/system)
Backend: Docker health returns expected 'nicht verfügbar' message (GET /api/health/docker)
Backend: Services health returns service status (GET /api/health/services)
Backend: Dashboard stats (GET /api/dashboard/stats)
Backend: Services list (GET /api/services)
Backend: Theme update (PUT /api/auth/theme)
Backend: Chat endpoint (POST /api/chat)
Backend: Logs retrieval (GET /api/logs)
Frontend: Login flow with email/password
Frontend: Dashboard renders with stats (4 Dienste, 1 Benutzer, logs count)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 services (CaseDesk AI, ForgePilot, Nextcloud, Unraid)
Frontend: Navigate to Health page from Dashboard
Frontend: Health page shows Uptime banner
Frontend: Health page shows CPU section with overall percent and per-core percent
Frontend: Health page shows Memory section with donut chart and GB values
Frontend: Health page shows Disk section with usage bars
Frontend: Health page shows Network section with interface info
Frontend: Health page shows Docker section with 'nicht verfügbar' message
Frontend: Health page auto-refresh toggle (LIVE/PAUSE)
Frontend: Health page refresh button
Frontend: Back navigation from Health to Dashboard
Frontend: Theme switching between Star Trek (LCARS) and Disney
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx useEffect has missing dependency warning for fetchData - consider using useCallback
Health page /api/health/services call could also benefit from timeout to prevent slow loading
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard data loading issue was fixed by adding timeout to /api/health/services call. Docker socket is not available in preview environment (expected). External services (CaseDesk, ForgePilot, Nextcloud, Unraid) are offline in preview. Both LCARS (Star Trek) and Disney themes work correctly. All Health page sections display real server data.

mocked_apis.note: Docker socket not available in preview - shows fallback message instead of real containers (expected behavior)
